user_query: Update mothers teriyaki salmon bowl lunch to a tofu based dish

updated_paths: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 2 > Lunch > Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi

update_results.path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 2 > Lunch > Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi

short_description.from: Pan-seared salmon fillet glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger.
short_description.to: Crispy pan-seared tofu cubes glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger.

meal_suggestion.from: Pan-sear salmon skin-side down until crispy, then glaze with a mix of soy sauce, mirin, and a touch of sugar. Serve over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced nori.
meal_suggestion.to: Press firm tofu to remove moisture, cut into cubes, and pan-sear until golden and crispy. Glaze with a mix of soy sauce, mirin, and a touch of sugar. Serve over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced nori.

nutrition_note.from: Salmon is rich in omega-3 fatty acids supporting heart and brain health; broccoli provides fiber, vitamin C, and sulforaphane; rice offers sustained energy. Teriyaki glaze contains sodium and sugar — make homemade to control amounts. Pickled ginger aids digestion.
nutrition_note.to: Tofu provides a high-quality plant-based protein and is low in saturated fat; broccoli provides fiber, vitamin C, and sulforaphane; rice offers sustained energy. Teriyaki glaze contains sodium and sugar — make homemade to control amounts. Pickled ginger aids digestion.
